title: Buzbug LED Bug Zapper Indoor Outdoor, Up to 50000 Hrs Lifespan Lamps, Energy Saving & Dual Band Attraction, 1.7 m Power Cord, High Voltage Mosquito Fly Zapper Trap Killer -MO008C
bullet_points: Upgraded Dual-Band Attraction: Unlike traditional single-band fly traps, the Buzbug LED bug zapper utilizes dual-color LEDs (365nm + 395nm) engineered to target a broader insect spectrum. This dual-wavelength LED system expands the range, attracting 30% more species of flying insects (such as mosquitoes, flies, and moths), especially effective in low-light or nocturnal environments.

High-Voltage Instant Electric Shock: Experience enhanced efficiency with our upgraded electric grid, capable of delivering a powerful electric shock in just 0.01 seconds. This rapid action eliminates a variety of insects, including mosquitoes, flies, moths, fruit flies, and culex.

Long-Lasting & Cost-Saving: No need for frequent bulb replacements. The durable UV-LED tubes feature a 25,000~50,000 hours lifespan—10 times longer than traditional glass tubes—providing a long-lasting solution that saves maintenance time and costs. (Bulbs are replaceable.)

Wide Coverage for Outdoor & Indoor: Including a 1.7 m cord, it can protect up to 1/2 acre for outdoor or 2,100 sq. ft. area for indoor, which makes the insect killer ideal for outdoor and indoor use. Great for gardens, backyards, patios, balconies, garages, and homes.

EPA Registered Safe & User-Friendly Design: This outdoor mosquito killer has a safe and dense, sturdy carbon steel protective grid. It is equipped with a dead insect collection tray at the bottom and a cleaning brush for user convenience. This electric bug zapper is U.S. EPA registered for compliance and reliability.

Reliable Warranty Statement: The Buzbug bug zapper comes with a one-year warranty. A 2-year warranty covers the LED lamp tube. The Buzbug LED fly zapper is designed for long-lasting performance. If the mosquito killer fails within this period, you can get a replacement through Buzbug's warranty service.

Durable & Sustainable: At Buzbug, we design products that combine long-lasting performance with energy efficiency, reducing power consumption without compromising performance. Additionally, with every purchase, we actively support carbon offset projects and reforestation initiatives, helping to ensure a green and sustainable future for everyone.
description:
Do you still have bug bites this summer?

Buzbug Bug Zapper can assist you in regaining your stylish and peaceful environment.

Buzbug Bug Zapper is meant to attract flying insects and electrocute them instantaneously using a high-voltage internal grid.

The Buzbug Bug Zapper can be used both indoors and outdoors. A great tool for any family who wants to maintain their home free of flies and other insects without having to spend time and effort on it every day.

Updated UV-LED Lamp Beads: 

Buzbug has upgraded the lamp tube for the bug zapper, using a lamp tube of 60 innovative UV-LED mosquito lamp beads. The surface of the tube might imitate the body's temperature if the temperature is kept between 36 and 37 degrees. UV-LED lamp beads can be used to efficiently release the mosquito's preferred wavelength. Only a mild light, which is not only safe for human health but also effective in lowering light pollution and conserving energy, is emitted by the lamp beads. It's crucial to keep in mind that mosquitoes are drawn to ultraviolet light rather than visible light. Therefore, increasing the brightness of the mosquito lamp is not recommended.

Grid Protection of 0.3 inch: 360° all-around grid protection, wary of fingers getting harmed inside the grid, safe for children and pets.

Wide Coverage: This outdoor insect killer may cover an area of up to 2,000 square feet.

Long Lasting Bulb: The LED light has a tens of thousands-hour lifespan. 

Where Should You Use the Bug Zapper?

A bug zapper is an excellent technique to keep bugs at bay in your home. They work best outside, but they can also be used indoors. The optimum location for your bug zapper is above your front door, at the entry to your home. It will assist you in controlling the pests that enter your home and preventing them from entering other rooms.

Disclaimer: Use caution when positioning your bug zapper so that it does not endanger your pets or children. It should also be located as far away from any water or gas lines as possible. 

How can Bug Zapper be made to perform more efficiently?

More Effective at Night: The optimal time to use your bug zapper is between dark and dawn. This is because the bugs are most active during those hours, and running your bug zapper during those hours will yield the best results.

Switch on in an Empty Space: Mosquitoes are drawn to carbon dioxide emitted by humans and animals, so keep your fly killer away from pets and people. To target mosquitoes indoors, we recommend using the fly swatter more frequently.

Q1: When is the best time to use the bug zapper?

A1: The bug zapper is designed for use only at night or in low-light conditions. Strong sunlight or bright indoor light can interfere with the UV attraction, reducing its effectiveness.

Q2: Where should I place the bug zapper for best performance?

A2: Place it away from people and pets, ideally about 1.8 m (6 ft) above the ground and away from strong light sources. Avoid placing it near water or gas lines.

Q3: How can I maintain the zapper for long-term use?

A3: Clean the grid and lamp regularly to remove dust and insect residues. Keep the surface clean for optimal performance.

Q4: What should I do if the lamp flickers or doesn’t light up?

A4: Turn off the power and check if the lamp tube is properly installed. If the issue continues, please contact customer service for assistance.
